## Incident Summary

Brief description of the incident.

## Timeline

- **Detected**:
- **Started**:
- **Resolved**:

## Impact

Describe the impact on users/services.

## Root Cause

What caused the incident?

## Resolution

How was it fixed?

## Prevention

What can be done to prevent similar incidents?

## Logs/Metrics

Attach relevant logs, screenshots, or links to monitoring data.
